title: Tierability
body: Required dependencies: [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), [BCLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bclib), [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets). ## About Tierability is a minecraft mod that adds new content. You can find new ore with different tier. Tools, armor, some blocks and some artifacts can be upgraded on special table. You can add a special effect to you tools and armor or just increase their efficiency. [](https://discord.gg/DcemWeskeZ) ## Showcase | | | | --- | --- |
